seo.title: Building Data Extraction with Google ADK + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build data extraction with Google ADK + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building data extraction pipelines with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables schema-guided extraction from unstructured documents using Gemini-powered multi-agent systems. Guardrails are essential to prevent common failures like circular agent dependencies, model output inconsistencies, and schema compliance violations that can corrupt extracted data. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure reliable, accurate extractions at scale.

architectureOverview.heading: Data Extraction Architecture with Google ADK
architectureOverview.description:
Google ADK orchestrates multi-agent workflows where a Router Agent delegates document chunks to Specialist Extraction Agents, each using Gemini models with structured schema prompts. The Specialists return JSON outputs that a Validator Agent merges and checks for completeness before final assembly. Session state tracks extraction progress across long documents, with tools handling retries and format normalization.

This agentic approach scales to large document sets but introduces risks from inter-agent handoffs and model variability. Vex integrates as a before_agent_callback to verify inputs/outputs against extraction schemas proactively.

Key components include schema-defined Pydantic models, Gemini function calling, and ADK's session management for stateful conversations.

risks.name: Multi-agent delegation creating circular dependencies
risks.description: Router Agent endlessly delegates between Specialists due to incomplete task definitions
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies delegation payloads contain valid task boundaries before agent execution

risks.name: Gemini model switching causing output inconsistency
risks.description: Different Gemini variants (1.5 Flash vs Pro) produce varying JSON structures for same schema
risks.mitigation: Vex enforces schema compliance regardless of model version using Pydantic validation

risks.name: Session state corruption in long conversations
risks.description: Document chunk processing corrupts ADK session state across multiple extraction rounds
risks.mitigation: Vex snapshots and validates session state at each agent boundary

risks.name: Tool response format mismatches across agents
risks.description: Specialist Agents return inconsistent JSON keys missing required schema fields
risks.mitigation: Vex type-checks all tool outputs against unified extraction schema before merging

implementation.title: Define Extraction Schema with Pydantic
implementation.description: Create structured output models for invoice data extraction using Pydantic BaseModel
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional
from datetime import date

class LineItem(BaseModel):
    description: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
    quantity: float = Field(..., gt=0)
    unit_price: float = Field(..., gt=0)
    total: Optional[float] = None

class Invoice(BaseModel):
    invoice_number: str = Field(..., pattern=r'^INV-\d{6}')
    date: date
    vendor: str
    total_amount: float = Field(..., gt=0)
    line_items: List[LineItem] = Field(..., min_items=1)

class ExtractionResult(BaseModel):
    invoices: List[Invoice] = Field(..., max_items=50)
    confidence: float = Field(..., ge=0.0, le=1.0)
    missing_fields: List[str] = []

implementation.title: Router Agent for Document Delegation
implementation.description: Top-level agent that splits documents and delegates to specialists

implementation.title: Specialist Extraction Agent
implementation.description: Invoice specialist using function calling for structured extraction
implementation.code:
invoice_extractor = LlmAgent(
    name="InvoiceExtractor",
    model="gemini-1.5-flash",
    system_prompt="""You extract invoice data using the exact schema.
    Return partial results if uncertain. Never hallucinate numbers.
    Use function calling for structured output.""",
    tools=[
        Tool(
            name="extract_invoice",
            description="Extract invoice data from text",
            parameters=Invoice.model_json_schema()
        )
    ]
)

def extract_from_chunk(chunk_text: str) -> ExtractionResult:
    response = invoice_extractor.run(chunk_text)
    return Invoice.parse_raw(response.tool_calls[0].args)

implementation.title: Validator Agent for Final Schema Check
implementation.description: Merges specialist outputs and validates completeness
implementation.code:
validator_agent = LlmAgent(
    name="Validator",
    model="gemini-1.5-pro",
    system_prompt="Validate merged extraction:
    - All invoices have required fields
    - Line items sum to total_amount
    - Dates are valid
    Flag missing data but never fabricate.",
    tools=[
        Tool(
            name="validate_extraction",
            description="Final validation",
            parameters=ExtractionResult.model_json_schema()
        )
    ]
)

def final_validation(results: List[dict]) -> ExtractionResult:
    merged = validator_agent.run({"results": results})
    return ExtractionResult.parse_raw(merged.content)

vexIntegration.title: Install Vex SDK and Configure
vexIntegration.description: Install dependencies and initialize Vex client for ADK integration
vexIntegration.code:
pip install google-adk vex-sdk pydantic[email protected]

from vex import Vex
from pydantic import BaseModel

vex = Vex(api_key="your-vex-api-key")

# Define verification suite for data extraction
extraction_suite = vex.create_suite(
    name="adk-data-extraction",
    risk_profile="medium",
    verifications=[
        "schema_compliance",
        "field_accuracy",
        "completeness_validation",
        "type_consistency"
    ]
)

# Create guard for extraction schema
extraction_guard = extraction_suite.create_guard(
    name="invoice_schema",
    schema=Invoice.model_json_schema(),
    required_fields=["invoice_number", "total_amount"]
)

vexIntegration.title: Add Vex before_agent_callback
vexIntegration.description: Intercept all agent calls to verify inputs/outputs against schema

vexIntegration.title: Runtime Monitoring and Auto-Recovery
vexIntegration.description: Vex monitors extraction quality and triggers agent retries on failures
